THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HONG, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIM, LANSFORD LUXOR CABS, INC. $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,250.00, THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 90% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT LIM, AND 10% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB.
